overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a grassy mountain valley at dusk. The character travels along a dirt path, passing a wooden cabin and encountering horseback riders as night falls and stars appear in the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland valley with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path through grassland toward distant mountains

entered.detail: large rocky mountain peaks silhouetted against the purple-blue sky
small wooden structure situated on the hillside to the right
narrow dirt trail winding through the grassy terrain
group of evergreen trees scattered on the right hillside
tall metal lattice tower visible in the distant left valley

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland valley at dusk, with a mountain range looming ahead. A wooden cabin sits on the right hillside while a distant metal tower becomes visible on the left as the character progresses along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail along cliff edge with valley overlook

agents.ego_description: walking along cliffside path with valley drop-off visible to the left

entered.detail: steep earthen cliff face rising alongside the path on the right
deep valley drop-off to the left revealing distant terrain below

segments.scene_description: The path curves along a cliff edge with a steep drop-off to the left revealing a valley overlook. The wooden cabin and initial tree cluster pass out of view behind the character while the metal tower shifts toward the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: night mountain trail under starry sky

events.description: two horseback riders appear from the left and cross the path ahead
sky darkens significantly with stars becoming clearly visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as night falls, passing horseback riders

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback crossing the path from left to right
second rider on horseback following the first across the path

entered.detail: dark night sky with visible stars replacing the dusk blue
large deciduous tree with sparse foliage beside the path

segments.scene_description: As night deepens, two horseback riders cross the path from left to right. The sky transitions to a starry night, and the mountains become dark silhouettes against the horizon. The character continues walking past scattered oak trees as the metal tower fades into the distant left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a mountain valley that transitions from a dim dusk into a clear, starry night. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path through open grasslands, passing a wooden cabin on a hillside as a distant metal tower emerges on the left. As the path curves along a cliff edge, the cabin disappears from view and the perspective opens into a steep valley overlook while the metal tower shifts toward the center of the frame. The scene then shifts as night deepens and the sky fills with stars, turning the looming mountains into dark silhouettes against the horizon. Finally, the camera follows the character past scattered oak trees and two horseback riders crossing the path before the metal tower fades into the distance.
